description_long: This is a military-style helmet with an olive green, slightly weathered hard shell and integrated black ear protection on both sides. The helmet features a built-in communication headset, including a microphone boom and attached cables, suggesting use in aviation or tactical operations. The chin strap is visible, made of a tan fabric with a black buckle for secure fastening. The interior appears to be lined with a softer, tan padding for comfort and impact absorption. The helmet lacks any visible ventilation holes or decorative graphics, maintaining a utilitarian and functional appearance. The overall design prioritizes protection, communication, and secure fit for the wearer.
description: Olive green military helmet with black ear protection, integrated headset, and tan chin strap, designed for tactical or aviation use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open face area, black ear covers, microphone boom, and tan chin strap with buckle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded shell, black ear protection, and attached microphone boom extending forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, unadorned back of the helmet and the tan interior padding visible at the bottom edge.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ear protection, headset wiring, and chin strap attachment.
